_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: we observed an upward shift in side scatter (SSC), particularly in S462TY cells, indicating an increase in cellular granularity
details: Upward shift in side scatter (SSC) indicating increase in cellular granularity after FT895 treatment
